text:
PyTorch Deep Learning Framework Knowledge Base for VORTEX FLAME.
CORE CAPABILITIES: Tensor computation with GPU acceleration (CUDA/cuDNN), automatic differentiation (autograd), neural network modules, distributed training (DDP/FSDP), model quantization (dynamic/static/QAT), TorchScript and torch.compile for production.
TRAINING INFRASTRUCTURE: Optimizers (Adam/AdamW/SGD), LR schedulers (CosineAnnealing/OneCycleLR), mixed precision (AMP fp16/bf16), gradient accumulation, checkpoint save/resume.
JEPA INTEGRATION: C-JEPA uses PyTorch as primary tensor backend. SlotAttention via nn.MultiheadAttention. CausalPredictor uses TransformerEncoder. VICReg loss in pure PyTorch. Target encoder uses EMA updates.
SAFETY: Never run destructive model ops without permission. Monitor GPU memory. Checkpoints saved before risky operations. Model weights never leave local machine.

NVIDIA CUDA GPU Computing Knowledge Base.
STACK: CUDA Toolkit (nvcc compiler, cuBLAS/cuDNN/cuFFT libraries). GPU architectures: Volta (V100), Ampere (A100), Hopper (H100). Memory hierarchy: global/shared/local/constant/texture. Streams and events for async execution. Tensor Cores for matrix multiply.
V100 SPECIFICS (our hardware): 16GB HBM2, 900 GB/s bandwidth, 5120 CUDA cores, 640 Tensor cores. FP16: 28 TFLOPS, FP32: 14 TFLOPS. TCC mode (Windows native, not WSL2). Max power: 250W.
MEMORY: torch.cuda.memory_allocated(), empty_cache(), fragmentation detection, OOM prevention via gradient checkpointing and batch size tuning. 4bit NF4 quantization ~4x memory reduction.
SAFETY: Monitor GPU temp (throttle >85C), never allocate >80% VRAM, run nvidia-smi before new process, kill zombie processes.

Docker Container Knowledge Base.
CORE CONCEPTS: Images (immutable templates), Containers (running instances), Volumes (persistent data), Networks (bridge/host/overlay/macvlan), Docker Compose (multi-container orchestration).
KEY COMMANDS: docker build -t name:tag ., docker run -d --name xxx -p 8080:80 -v /host:/container image, docker exec -it container bash, docker logs -f container, docker-compose up -d.
JEPA/VORTEX USAGE: Run training in isolated container for reproducibility. MCP servers containerized. Knowledge base databases (Qdrant/Chroma) in containers. API gateway with health checks.
SAFETY: Never --privileged flag. Never mount sensitive host dirs (/etc,/sys). Always specific image tags. Resource limits: --memory/--cpus. Never expose Docker socket.

MATLAB / Scientific Simulation Knowledge Base.
MATLAB: Matrix operations, signal processing toolbox, control system design, Simulink block modeling, optimization toolbox, parallel computing.
SIMULATION: ANSYS (FEA structural/thermal/fluid), COMSOL (multiphysics), OpenFOAM (open-source CFD).
JEPA INTEGRATION: MATLAB exports models via ONNX. Simulation data feeds PHYS-JEPA training. Physical simulation results validate JEPA predictions. Counterfactual scenarios feed causal learning.
SAFETY: Validate simulation params before long runs. Never modify production simulation without version control. Results must be reproducible (seed RNG).

Jupyter Interactive Computing Knowledge Base.
ECOSYSTEM: Jupyter Notebook (.ipynb), JupyterLab (IDE), JupyterHub (multi-user), IPython (enhanced shell), nbconvert (to script/HTML/PDF).
BEST PRACTICES: Clear outputs before git commit. Use %matplotlib inline. Use %%time/%%timeit for perf. Use ! for shell, % for magics. Restart kernel and run all before sharing.
VORTEX INTEGRATION: Notebooks as KB entries. Jupyter kernel for sandbox code execution. nbconvert for docs. Papermill for parameterized execution.

OpenCV Computer Vision Knowledge Base.
CORE: Image I/O (imread/imwrite/imshow), color space conversion (BGR<->RGB<->HSV<->GRAY), image processing (resize/blur/threshold/morphology), feature detection (SIFT/ORB/Harris), object detection (Haar/HOG/DNN), video capture (VideoCapture).
DEEP LEARNING: cv2.dnn.readNetFromCaffe/TensorFlow/ONNX, YOLO integration, face/pose/segmentation.
V-JEPA INTEGRATION: Camera frames to V-JEPA visual encoder. Object detection results to ObjectGraph entities. Motion detection to temporal causal chains. Scene understanding to world model state update.
SAFETY: Never save camera frames without consent. Face detection results not persisted without authorization. Video streams processed locally only. Camera access explicitly granted per session.

OBS Studio Streaming Software Knowledge Base.
CAPABILITIES: Scene composition (multiple sources layered), sources (display/window/game/video/image/text capture), audio mixing (per-source volume/filters/monitoring), streaming (RTMP to Twitch/YouTube/Bilibili), recording (local file custom encoder), virtual camera output.
SCRIPTING: obs-websocket for remote control. Switch scenes programmatically. Start/stop streaming. Get source properties, modify filters.
VORTEX INTEGRATION: OBS as visual data source for V-JEPA. Scene switching via JEPA anomaly detection. Streaming automation via device_gateway. Recording triggered by events.

FFmpeg Media Processing Knowledge Base.
CORE: Format conversion, codec selection (-c:v libx264/-c:a aac), resolution scaling (-vf scale), frame extraction (-vf fps=1), audio extraction (-vn -acodec copy), video trimming (-ss/-t).
ADVANCED: Hardware acceleration (-hwaccel cuda/qsv), filter graphs (multi-step), streaming output (-f flv rtmp://), concatenation.
JEPA INTEGRATION: Video preprocessing for V-JEPA training, frame extraction at target FPS, audio extraction for A-JEPA input, batch processing for datasets.

DaVinci Resolve Professional Video Editing Knowledge Base.
CAPABILITIES: Edit (timeline NLE), Color (professional grading, HDR), Fusion (node-based compositing/VFX), Fairlight (audio post), Deliver (custom presets).
SCRIPTING: Python API for automation. Timeline manipulation. Render automation via job queue. Media pool management.
VORTEX INTEGRATION: Automated video rendering pipeline. Color grading consistency via DESIGN-JEPA. Batch processing via workflow.

Vector Database Knowledge Base.
QDRANT (our primary): Rust-based high-performance vector search. Payload pre-filtering. Quantization (scalar/product/binary). Collections with configurable dimensions. Distance: Cosine/Euclidean/Dot.
CHROMA: Python-native embedded vector DB. Simple add/query/update/delete API. Metadata filtering. Persistent and ephemeral modes.
MILVUS: Cloud-native distributed. Multiple index types (IVF_FLAT/HNSW/ANNOY). Hybrid search. Partitioning.
VORTEX USAGE: soul_memory uses semantic search (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384-dim). WorldEmbeddingCache uses FTS5+numpy. KB entries chunked/embedded/stored. Hybrid BM25+semantic retrieval.
SAFETY: Never delete collections without backup. Collection creation requires permission. Embedding model version tracked. Index rebuilds planned.

SQL Database and ETL Knowledge Base.
DATABASES: SQLite (embedded, file-based, zero-config, soul_memory backend), PostgreSQL (advanced, JSON, FTS), MySQL/MariaDB (widely used), Redis (in-memory KV, pub/sub).
ETL PATTERNS: Extract (API/file/DB/webhook), Transform (clean/normalize/join/aggregate/enrich), Load (batch/upsert/incremental).
OPERATIONS: SELECT with JOIN/GROUP BY/HAVING/window functions, INSERT ON CONFLICT (upsert), CREATE INDEX, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, transactions (BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK).
PIPELINE TOOLS: Apache Airflow (DAG scheduling), Prefect (Python-native), dbt (transformation), Kafka (streaming).
SAFETY: Never DROP TABLE or DELETE without WHERE. Always parameterized queries. Backup before migration. Monitor connection pools. Never expose DB ports publicly.

File System and Storage Knowledge Base.
LOCAL: NTFS (Windows permissions/compression/encryption). Path conventions. Large file chunked read/write. File watching (watchdog).
NETWORK: NAS (SMB/NFS), cloud sync (OneDrive/Google Drive, caution: privacy). Backup: 3-2-1 rule (3 copies, 2 media, 1 offsite).
VORTEX LAYOUT: D:/VORTEX_FLAME/ = project root. E:/ = training data and large assets. .vf_memory/ = soul DBs. .vf_world_cache/ = world embedding cache. ajepa_checkpoints/ = training snapshots.
SAFETY: Never delete project files without confirmation. Checkpoints critical (version before cleaning). Monitor disk space. Log rotation.

SSH Remote Access Knowledge Base.
PROTOCOL: Secure Shell encrypted remote terminal. Key-based auth (ssh-keygen -t ed25519). Port forwarding (-L/-R/-D). SCP/SFTP secure file transfer. Config file (~/.ssh/config).
COMMANDS: ssh user@host command, ssh -i keyfile user@host, ssh -L 8080:localhost:80 user@host, scp file.txt user@host:/path/, rsync -avz.
WINDOWS: OpenSSH client (built-in Win10+), PuTTY (GUI), WinSCP (GUI file transfer).
VORTEX INTEGRATION: Remote training monitoring via SSH. Model deployment to remote servers. Log retrieval. Device gateway network backend.
SAFETY: Never hardcode SSH keys. Use ed25519 (not RSA<2048). Disable password auth on prod. Rate-limit SSH attempts. Never expose port 22 publicly.

Remote Desktop Control Knowledge Base.
PROTOCOLS: RDP (Windows native), VNC (cross-platform), TeamViewer/AnyDesk (NAT traversal), Sunshine/Moonlight (low latency).
WINDOWS RDP: System->Remote Desktop->On, mstsc.exe client, multi-monitor, clipboard/drive redirection.
VORTEX: Remote GUI control via device_gateway, visual state observation for V-JEPA, software operation verification.
SAFETY: Strong password or cert auth. Never expose port 3389. Use VPN/SSH tunnel. Auto-lock on disconnect.

Network Monitoring Knowledge Base.
TOOLS: Wireshark (packet capture), tcpdump (CLI), netstat/ss (connections), ntopng (traffic), Prometheus+Grafana (dashboards).
FIREWALL: Windows Defender Firewall, iptables/nftables (Linux), pfSense/OPNsense, nmap (port scanning).
VORTEX: API server port monitoring, MCP server health checks, network latency impact on cloud LLM calls, local network isolation.
SAFETY: Never disable firewall. Monitor unexpected outbound connections. API servers bind localhost by default. Use HTTPS for external services.

Arduino Microcontroller Knowledge Base.
BOARDS: Uno (ATmega328P/16MHz/32KB), Mega (more I/O), ESP32 (WiFi+BT/dual-core/240MHz), STM32 (ARM Cortex-M), RP2040.
PROGRAMMING: Arduino IDE (C/C++ simplified API), PlatformIO (professional), MicroPython. Digital I/O: pinMode/digitalWrite/digitalRead. Analog: analogRead (ADC)/analogWrite (PWM). Serial: begin/print/read.
PROTOCOLS: I2C (Wire, 2 wires), SPI (high-speed master-slave), UART/Serial (point-to-point), CAN bus.
VORTEX: Sensor data collection to JEPA world state. Motor/actuator via device_gateway. Feedback: sense->JEPA->act. Firmware OTA.
SAFETY: Always watchdog timer in firmware. Emergency stop for motors. Current limiting on outputs. Never connect high voltage to GPIO.

Raspberry Pi Knowledge Base.
MODELS: Pi 4B (quad Cortex-A72, up to 8GB), Pi 5 (faster CPU, PCIe), Pi Zero 2W (ultra-compact). GPIO: 40-pin (I2C/SPI/UART/PWM).
OS: Raspberry Pi OS (Debian), Ubuntu Server/Desktop ARM, DietPi (lightweight).
CAPABILITIES: GPIO (RPi.GPIO/gpiozero), Camera (picamera2), HATs (add-on boards), I2C (raspi-config), Network (WiFi/Ethernet/BT).
VORTEX: Edge computing for local JEPA inference. Sensor hub (collect/preprocess). Camera feed to V-JEPA. Audio input to A-JEPA. MQTT IoT bridge.
SAFETY: Proper PSU (5V/3A min for Pi4). Heat sink for sustained loads. Safe shutdown (sudo shutdown -h now). Never hot-plug GPIO. ESD protection.

Industrial Communication Protocols Knowledge Base.
MODBUS: RTU (serial RS-232/485 binary), TCP (Ethernet port 502). Function codes (read coils/registers, write). Master-slave architecture. PLC/sensors/actuators.
OPC UA: Platform-independent service-oriented. Security (encryption/auth/auditing). Information modeling (object-oriented). Pub/Sub extension.
CAN BUS: Controller Area Network message-based. No host needed. Automotive/industrial. CANopen higher protocol.
VORTEX: Industrial sensor data to JEPA world state. PLC control via device_gateway modbus backend. Predictive maintenance via JEPA anomaly detection. Process optimization via JEPA counterfactual.
SAFETY: Never modify PLC program without offline test. Emergency stop must be hardware. Industrial protocols need isolated network. Verify signal range before actuation.

GIS Geographic Information Systems Knowledge Base.
TOOLS: ArcGIS (commercial), QGIS (open-source Python scripting), GDAL/OGR (translation), PostGIS (spatial PostgreSQL), Leaflet/OpenLayers (web).
FORMATS: Vector (Shapefile/GeoJSON/KML/GeoPackage), Raster (GeoTIFF/NetCDF/HDF), CRS (WGS84 EPSG:4326, Web Mercator EPSG:3857).
ANALYSIS: Spatial query (point-in-polygon/buffer/intersection), Geocoding, Terrain (slope/aspect/watershed), Network (shortest path/service area).
VORTEX: CGEOJEPA causal ecosystem/geographic modeling. Spatial causal chains (deforestation->erosion->flood). Map data as structured knowledge. Humboldt soul integration.
SAFETY: Verify coordinate system before analysis. Spatial data precision matters. Large rasters need tiled processing.

Medical Imaging Knowledge Base.
MODALITIES: X-ray (projection), CT (3D reconstruction), MRI (soft tissue), Ultrasound (real-time), PET/SPECT (functional/molecular).
DICOM STANDARD: .dcm format (header+pixel data). Tags (patient/study/modality/series). PACS (archiving system).
ANALYSIS: Segmentation (U-Net/nnU-Net), Classification, Registration (multi-modal alignment), Measurement (distance/area/volume).
VORTEX: CBIOJEPA medical causal reasoning (Darwin soul). Image analysis via V-JEPA encoder. Diagnostic support (anomaly detection).
SAFETY: Medical data must be de-identified. Never claim diagnostic certainty. AI-assisted disclaimer required. HIPAA/GDPR compliance. DICOM headers contain PHI.

ERP Financial Systems Knowledge Base.
SYSTEMS: SAP (largest ERP), Oracle ERP (cloud), Kingdee/Yonyou (Chinese leaders), Odoo (open-source).
MODULES: General Ledger (chart of accounts/journal entries), AP/AR (invoicing/payments), Asset Management (depreciation/lifecycle), Financial Reporting (P&L/balance sheet/cash flow), Tax Management (VAT/income tax), Budgeting/Forecasting.
STANDARDS: IFRS (international), GAAP (US), XBRL (reporting language).
VORTEX: CFINJEPA causal financial modeling (Strategy soul). Automated reconciliation via workflow. Anomaly detection in transactions. Counterfactual scenario modeling.
SAFETY: Financial data encrypted at rest. Never modify records without audit trail. Reconciliation verified by human for large amounts. Tax calculations follow current regulations. AI suggests, human approves.

Publishing and Printing Knowledge Base.
DTP: Adobe InDesign (professional layout), QuarkXPress (alternative), Scribus (open-source), LaTeX (academic typesetting).
PRINT: CMYK color space (vs RGB), bleed/trim/safe zone, 300 DPI (print) vs 72 DPI (screen), font embedding/licensing, PDF/X standards.
DIGITAL: EPUB (reflowable e-book), PDF, HTML/CSS (web publications), XML/DITA (structured authoring).
VORTEX: Document generation via workflow automation. CARTJEPA aesthetic layout evaluation (Monet soul). Automated LaTeX typesetting. Batch document conversion.

Security Surveillance Knowledge Base.
HARDWARE: IP Cameras (Hikvision/Dahua), NVR (Network Video Recorder), Access control (card/biometric), Alarm systems (motion/door/glass break).
PROTOCOLS: RTSP (Real Time Streaming), ONVIF (open camera standard), H.264/H.265 (video codecs).
ANALYTICS: Motion detection (frame differencing), Object detection (person/vehicle/face), LPR/ANPR, Intrusion detection (zone-based), Crowd analysis.
VORTEX: CVJEPA anomaly detection in surveillance video. Real-time alerting via workflow. Event-triggered recording. Scene understanding for security state.
SAFETY: Surveillance data is privacy-sensitive. Face recognition requires consent in many jurisdictions. Retention period defined/enforced. Access logs for all data access. Encryption for stored footage.

Audio-JEPA (CAJEPA) Auditory World Model Knowledge Base.
ARCHITECTURE: Input (raw waveform or mel spectrogram). Encoder (CNN feature projector to 512-dim). Slot Attention (5 slots: drums_percussion, bass, vocals, melody_lead, harmony_pads). CausalPredictor (predicts masked slot evolution over time). CausalVICRegLoss (sim+var+cov+causal 4-term).
TRAINING OBJECTIVES: Predict next beat/tempo from rhythm. Predict harmonic progression from chords. Predict timbre change from instrument state. Counterfactual: what if bass drops out? Cross-source prediction.
CURRENT STATUS: A-JEPA Phase 1 training (Epoch 50+/100, loss ~47). Training Data: E: large audio dataset.
APPLICATIONS: Music analysis (key/tempo/structure). Sound source separation. Audio anomaly detection. Environmental sound understanding. Speech emotion.
HARDWARE (reserved): Sound card to CAJEPA encode. DAW (Ableton/Logic) to CAJEPA analysis. Microphone to real-time audio stream. Speakers to playback verification.

Speech and Voice Understanding Knowledge Base.
MODALITIES: ASR (speech to text), Speaker identification, Emotion recognition (happy/sad/angry/neutral), Intent detection, Language identification.
DATASETS: LibriSpeech (1000h English), CommonVoice (multilingual), VoxCeleb (speaker ID), RAVDESS (emotional), SpeechCommands (keyword spotting).
FEATURES: MFCC (mel-frequency cepstral), Pitch/F0 tracking, Formants (vocal tract resonances), Energy/volume, Zero-crossing rate.
A-JEPA INTEGRATION: Speech waveform to CAJEPA slot encoding. Speaker embedding as persistent slot identity. Emotion as slot attribute (continuous dimension).
SAFETY: Voice data is biometric (PII). Never store raw audio without consent. Speaker identification restricted to authorized cases. Transcription accuracy not overstated.

Environmental Sound Understanding Knowledge Base.
CATEGORIES: Natural (rain/wind/thunder/waves/birds/animals), Urban (traffic/sirens/construction/footsteps), Domestic (doorbell/phone/appliance/water), Industrial (motor/fan/alarm/machine), Human (speech/cough/laugh/cry/clap).
DATASETS: ESC-50 (2000 clips/50 classes), UrbanSound8K (8732 clips/10 classes), FSD50K (51K clips/200 classes), MIMII (industrial normal/anomaly).
ANALYSIS: Scene classification, Event detection, Anomaly detection, Audio tagging (multi-label).
A-JEPA INTEGRATION: Environmental sound to CAJEPA world state. Anomaly detection via deviation from learned patterns. Scene context for multi-modal world model. Industrial monitoring.
SAFETY: Environmental audio may capture private conversations. Industrial monitoring not a replacement for safety systems. Alert sensitivity configurable.

Music Theory and Acoustics Knowledge Base.
THEORY: Pitch (frequency/Hz, MIDI notes, note names C/D/E...). Intervals (octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3). Scales (major/minor/pentatonic/modes). Chords (triads/7th/extended/inversions/voicings). Key (tonic center, key signature, modulation). Rhythm (tempo/BPM, time signature, beat, subdivision). Form (verse/chorus/bridge/ABA/sonata).
ACOUSTICS: Harmonic series (f_n=n*f0). Timbre (spectral envelope/formants/attack/decay). Room (reverb/RT60/reflection/absorption). Psychoacoustics (loudness/pitch perception/masking).
CHINESE MUSIC: Pentatonic scale, 12 pitches system.
DAW PRODUCTION: Tracks (audio/MIDI/instrument/FX/bus). Processing (EQ/compression/reverb/delay/distortion). Mixing (level/panning/frequency). Mastering (LUFS/dynamic range/stereo).
BEETHOVEN INTEGRATION: CAJEPA learns harmonic causal relationships between instrument slots. Music theory rules constrain JEPA predictions. Chord progression prediction. Counterfactual key changes.
SOFTWARE (reserved): DAW (Ableton/Logic/Cubase/Reaper/FL Studio), Notation (MuseScore/Sibelius/Dorico), Analysis (Sonic Visualiser/Praat/librosa), AI (Demucs/Basic Pitch).

Audio Hardware and Signal Processing Knowledge Base.
INTERFACES: Focusrite Scarlett (USB), Allen & Heath (mixers), RME (pro/low-latency), ASIO (low-latency Windows driver), WASAPI.
MICROPHONES: Dynamic (rugged/live, SM58), Condenser (sensitive/studio, U87), Ribbon (warm/vintage), Lavalier (clip-on/speech), Measurement (flat/calibration).
SIGNAL: Sampling (44.1kHz CD/48kHz video/96kHz pro), Bit depth (16-bit CD/24-bit pro/32-bit float DAW), Anti-aliasing filter, Dithering.
DSP: FFT (time to frequency domain), STFT (spectrogram), Mel spectrogram (perceptual frequency), MFCC (cepstral), Filtering (LP/HP/BP/notch).
A-JEPA INPUT PIPELINE: 1. Raw audio (WAV/MP3) resample to 22050Hz mono. 2. Mel spectrogram (n_mels=128, hop=512, n_fft=2048). 3. AudioFeatureProjector CNN to 512-dim. 4. SlotAttention to 5 slots x 128-dim. 5. CausalPredictor temporal reasoning.
SAFETY: Monitor input levels (avoid clipping >0dBFS). Phantom power (+48V) only for condenser mics. Ground loop prevention (balanced XLR/TRS). Never hot-plug with phantom on. Hearing protection (<85dB SPL).

Audio-JEPA Training and Deployment Knowledge Base.
TRAINING: Data prep (mp3/wav to mel spectrogram to AudioDataset). Model (AudioFeatureProjector+CJEPALayer 5 slots). Loss (CausalVICRegLoss sim=2.0/var=1.0/cov=0.5/causal=0.3). Optimizer (AdamW lr=5e-5 wd=1e-4). Scheduler (CosineAnnealing+warmup). Protection (jepa_training_guard.py).
STATUS: Phase 1 (pretrain slot attention, no masking) Epoch 50+/100. Training on E: audio data. Loss ~47 decreasing. VRAM ~0.2GB.
PHASES: Phase 2 (object-level masking+causal prediction), Phase 3 (RL curiosity fine-tuning), Phase 4 (Beethoven soul integration+LoRA adapters).
DEPLOYMENT: Checkpoints at D:/VORTEX_FLAME/ajepa_checkpoints/. Inference (load checkpoint -> encode audio -> get slot embeddings). Real-time (streaming audio -> buffer -> periodic encode). Integration (JEPASoulBridge dual_pathway_query with modality).
GPU TASKS (pending): 1. Complete Phase 1 (100 epochs). 2. Phase 2 masking+CausalPredictor. 3. Phase 3 RL fine-tuning. 4. Cross-Attention fusion training. 5. World-Embedding real encoding.

Sound Source Separation and Analysis Knowledge Base.
SEPARATION: Demucs (Meta, hybrid spectrogram+waveform, drums/bass/vocals/other, real-time GPU). Spleeter (Deezer, U-Net, 2/4/5 stem, CPU-friendly). UVR (community models, MDX-Net/Demucs/VR, best vocal/instrumental).
ANALYSIS: Key detection (Krumhansl-Schmuckler/CNN), Tempo/beat (madmom/librosa.beat), Chord recognition (CNN+HMM/CREPE), Structure (self-similarity matrix), Onset detection (spectral flux/CNN).
TRANSCRIPTION: Basic Pitch (multi-pitch note on/off), Piano (Onsets and Frames), Drum (DNN hit detection), Guitar tab (automated).
A-JEPA ENHANCEMENT: Separated stems as individual slot training data. Beat-aligned segments for temporal supervision. Chord labels as harmonic constraints. Multi-instrument for richer slot semantics.
SAFETY: Copyright (separation output may retain original rights). Quality varies by genre (best on pop/rock). Real-time requires GPU. Separated audio may have phase artifacts.
